case_title: WAYNE LUTJE et al RESPONDENT VS. E & J GALLERY INC. (ALSO ROYAK GALLERY) APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT E & J GALLERY INC. (ALSO ROYAK GALLERY) AS TO RESPONDENT LUTJE, WAYNE BERGOVOY, JENNIFER HEARING SET FOR NOV-05-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2003 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2003 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CONTINUED TO NOV-05-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 001.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT LUTJE, WAYNE BERGOVOY, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM APPELLANT E & J GALLERY INC. (ALSO ROYAK GALLERY) $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $377.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
MINUTES FOR NOV-05-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2003 - JUDGMENT IS ORDERED FOR RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST APPELLANT/DEFENDANT FOR THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AND $75.00 ATTORNEY FEES AND FOR $52.00 COSTS; PARTIES ARE INFORMED THEY WILL RECEIVE A COPY OF THE COURT'S JUDGMENT BY MAIL; ALL EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED IN OPEN COURT TO RESPECTIVE PARTIES. JUDGE: WALLACE P. DOUGLASS; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: MARJORIE L. MANZELLA (D-001, 575 POLK STREET, WED., 05NOV2003).
